page_title: NEON GENESIS EVANGELION GAINAX MIDI COLLECTION
text:
is a arranged CD-ROM album by GAINAX. It was published by GAINAX, it was released on 20 February 1998.

Overview

Compatible sound sources: Roland SC-88, SC-88VL, SC-88ST, SC-88Pro
Compatible models: IBM-PC, AT machines or 100% compatible machines, NEC PC-9800 series, Apple Macintosh series, MIDI sequencer dedicated to playing SMF
Required equipment configuration: CD-ROM drive, MIDI interface and connection cable
Software For personal computer users: 
MIDI sequence software capable of playing SMF (Format 0)
If you are using Windows 3.1 or Windows 95, you can also use the "Media Player" that comes with Windows.
If you are using Windows 3.1, you will need to set up the MIDI mapper.
You can also use "Roland Virtual Sound Canvas VSC-88" This software includes a trial version.
If you are using a dedicated MIDI sequencer, please refer to the respective manual.
